summary: Iteration 216 — Frontend-only verification of the Universal Stock-Out delivery REVERSAL UX on the distributor 'Stock Out' tab. Logged in as CEO (surya.yadavalli@nylaairwater.earth), opened distributor b8876367-df64-4c55-a382-d5eb3b4b2380 (Surya 1, DIST-0010), Stock Out tab, set Time Period = 'Lifetime' (the listed value — review_request called it 'All Time' but the actual UI label is 'Lifetime'). NOTE: the first distributor id provided in the request (5196190f-5e0a-4c61-88d7-89528edabe51) returns 404 from /api/distributors/{id} for this tenant — that distributor is not present in the preview DB. All 4 acceptance behaviors PASSED on the second distributor: (1) REVERSED delivery DEL-2026-0007 — Actions menu renders (because of canRetryVoid logic) but does NOT include reverse-delivery-action. (2) CANCELLED delivery DEL-2026-0010 — the entire Actions menu does NOT render (no allowed actions), so reverse is also hidden. (3) CONFIRMED delivery DEL-2026-0005 — clicking Actions → 'Reverse delivery' opens data-testid=reverse-delivery-dialog; reverse-delivery-confirm-btn is DISABLED initially; reverse-delivery-reason field exists; after typing 'REVERSE' the confirm button becomes enabled; clicking confirm fires POST /api/distributors/b8876367.../deliveries/f94c81ba.../reverse?acknowledge=true&reason=TEST_iter_216_frontend_verification_confirmed → 200, success toast appears, dialog closes, list row updates to 'Reversed'. (4) DRAFT delivery DEL-2026-0019 — clicking Actions → 'Reverse delivery' did NOT open the dialog (count=0) and immediately fired POST .../reverse?acknowledge=false → 200; success toast 'Delivery DEL-2026-0019 reversed — stock reservation released' appeared; row updated to 'Reversed'. Detail modal closed in both reversal flows and the list re-fetched correctly.
action_items: [NOT BLOCKING] The double-confirm gating uses `reverseConfirmText.trim().toUpperCase() !== 'REVERSE'` (DistributorDetail.js:3319), so lowercase 'reverse' / mixed case 'Reverse' also enable the destructive button. The PRD wording was 'must type exactly REVERSE' — main agent may want to make this strictly case-sensitive (i.e. drop the .toUpperCase()) to match the intended friction. Functionally still safe because the user must still type the right word.

[INFO] First distributor id 5196190f-5e0a-4c61-88d7-89528edabe51 in the test instructions is not resolvable (404 from /api/distributors/{id}). Either the row was removed since the request was written, or it lives in a different tenant. All testing was completed against the second distributor.
critical_code_review_comments: DistributorDetail.js:3319 — confirm button enable condition is case-insensitive (`reverseConfirmText.trim().toUpperCase() !== 'REVERSE'`). The PRD spec says 'must type exactly REVERSE'. Consider tightening to `reverseConfirmText.trim() !== 'REVERSE'` so lowercase no longer bypasses the friction. Minor product-policy nit, not a correctness bug.

DistributorDetail.js:3345 — `canReverse = !['cancelled','reversed'].includes(st) && !selectedDelivery.settlement_id;` correctly hides reverse on cancelled / reversed / settlement-locked deliveries. Good. But the surrounding Actions menu only renders if ANY of {canConfirm, canComplete, canCancel, canReverse, canRetryVoid} is true (line 3347). For a fully terminal 'cancelled' delivery with no settlement, none of those is true and the entire menu vanishes — which means users can never see *why* reversal isn't offered. Consider rendering the menu with the menu items disabled + tooltips ('Reversal not allowed: delivery cancelled') for better discoverability. Cosmetic only.

doReverseDelivery (line 1994-2012) sends `acknowledge` and `reason` as query params — matches the backend signature. Good. But the success path only closes the dialog on success (line 2004-2007); on failure (catch) it leaves the dialog open and the typed 'REVERSE' text intact. Acceptable UX (lets user retry without retyping) but worth confirming with product.
seed_data_creation: No new data created. Two existing preview deliveries on distributor b8876367-df64-4c55-a382-d5eb3b4b2380 were reversed as part of validation (this was explicitly authorized in the review_request — 'acceptable to reverse ONE draft and ONE confirmed delivery'): • DEL-2026-0019 (was Draft) -> now Reversed (id 5f76b1b8-9987-4bcb-a505-0f5239ad4fdd). • DEL-2026-0005 (was Confirmed) -> now Reversed (id f94c81ba-791f-4eca-b175-dd1880f766c3, reason 'TEST_iter_216_frontend_verification_confirmed'). All other deliveries (DEL-2026-0007 already reversed, DEL-2026-0010 cancelled, DEL-2026-0011 scheduled, DEL-2026-0012 delivered, etc.) are untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The reverse-delivery flow is fully wired and behaving per spec on the Stock Out (Distributor -> Customer) panel. data-testids verified live: deliveries-time-filter (root Select on Stock Out panel, value 'lifetime' shows historical), delivery-row-{deliveryId} (clickable row), delivery-actions-menu-btn (three-dot trigger inside the detail modal — gated by canManage + at least one available action), reverse-delivery-action (DropdownMenuItem), reverse-delivery-dialog, reverse-delivery-reason, reverse-delivery-confirm-input, reverse-delivery-confirm-btn (variant=destructive), reverse-delivery-cancel. Note: TIME_FILTERS in /app/frontend/src/components/distributor/DeliveriesTab.jsx:17 uses 'lifetime' as the all-time option (label 'Lifetime'), not 'all_time' / 'All Time'. Distributor id 5196190f-5e0a-4c61-88d7-89528edabe51 returns 404 from the API in this preview env — only b8876367-df64-4c55-a382-d5eb3b4b2380 is usable.
rca of the issue: No bug to RCA — all 4 acceptance scenarios PASS. The one nit (case-insensitive REVERSE check) is documented above as a soft action item.
